creator: freebsd-ports@dan.me.uk
text:
Created attachment 168647
new distinfo and bump portrevision

LSI have re-rolled/updated the tarball for sas2ircu but with no bump to version number.  I thought perhaps it was just to update references to the broadcom takeover but it seems more than that.

I've bumped portrevision just in case it fixes any bugs and is more than just a cosmetic change.

It's a simple change, but here's testport logs just in case:

https://poudriere.dan.tm/poudriere/data/latest-per-pkg/sas2ircu/20.00.00.00_1/
